# Execution Boundary Plan

This planning note describes future certified execution boundary concepts only.

## Boundary Concepts

- Execution containment
- Execution isolation
- Execution quarantine
- Provider isolation
- Orchestration-controlled boundaries
- Replay and audit containment
- Shutdown conditions
- Safety certification evidence

## Non-Execution Statement

This file does not create workflows, deployment automation, provider integrations, runtime execution, credentials, branch protection settings, runtime authorization, route changes, or automatic approvals.
